title: POST_1: My first post
content:
So turns out that a new DPI firewall was deployed last night. From rumors that spread, they think China outsourced the firewall to us.
So all my WireGuard and OpenVPN just dropped.
I need a new way to access GitHub and finish all my dev work and research on human rights.
I am sending this to my friend using physical mail. I had to encrypt everything in PGP first; it also compresses the text, btw.
Then I encode it in QR code and print it out and send it to my friend.
Along with my Git credential, btw.
I am going to figure it out tomorrow. Good night.
From: Atlas
Everything here is fictional don’t take it for real. But it is technically accurate.
